payload.name: Acme Corp
payload.description: Acme Corp is a Fortune 500 manufacturing conglomerate using the Platform Pro tier for supply chain automation and procurement workflows across 14 global facilities.

payload.name: Globex Industries
payload.description: Globex Industries operates a SaaS-native logistics platform and adopted our Enterprise tier in Q2 2024. Primary use cases include real-time fleet tracking dashboards and automated invoice reconciliation.

payload.name: Initech Solutions
payload.description: Initech Solutions provides managed IT services to regional healthcare networks. Joined on the Mid-Market Platform plan in Q1 2025, primarily leveraging compliance reporting and audit trail features.

payload.name: Umbrella Analytics
payload.description: Umbrella Analytics was a mid-market customer focused on marketing attribution. Contract ended September 30, 2025 after a competitive displacement by an in-house solution. Exit interview flagged pricing and lack of native CRM integration.

payload.name: Pinnacle Retail Group
payload.description: Pinnacle Retail Group is a multi-brand e-commerce operator with 22 storefronts. Upgraded from Mid-Market to Enterprise Platform Pro in Q3 2025, expanding usage to include predictive inventory and supplier risk scoring modules.

payload.name: NovaBridge Consulting
payload.description: NovaBridge is a boutique strategy consultancy with 18 employees. On the SMB Starter plan, using the platform primarily for client deliverable tracking and automated weekly status report generation.

payload.name: Stratos Financial
payload.description: Stratos Financial is a regional investment bank that has been on the Enterprise Standard tier since 2022. Health score dropped to 42 in September due to low product adoption after a key champion departed. QBR scheduled for October 8.

payload.name: Meridian Healthcare Systems
payload.description: Meridian Healthcare Systems is a regional hospital network using the platform for patient workflow coordination and inter-department task routing. Strong NPS of 72 recorded in Q3 survey.

payload.name: Vertex Dynamics
payload.description: Vertex Dynamics is a seed-stage robotics startup evaluating the SMB Starter plan. Currently in a 14-day trial with active usage of the automation builder and webhook integrations. Sales follow-up scheduled for October 5.

payload.name: Cascade Education Trust
payload.description: Cascade Education Trust manages 14 charter schools and uses the platform for staff scheduling, curriculum approval workflows, and parent communication automation. Eligible for nonprofit pricing discount applied at renewal.

payload.name: Redwood DevOps
payload.description: Redwood DevOps is a 9-person engineering consultancy specializing in CI/CD pipeline design. Uses the Starter plan primarily for project intake forms and automated client onboarding sequences.

payload.name: Axiom Property Group
payload.description: Axiom Property Group is a commercial real estate firm managing 340 properties. The platform handles lease lifecycle management, maintenance ticketing, and vendor payment approval workflows for their operations team.
